data.title: Moonbirds to Unlock 27.08 Million Tokens on February 28
data.description: Moonbirds is set to unlock approximately 27.08 million tokens on February 28 at 13:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the data provided by the Web3 asset data platform, RootData. The tokens are valued at around $4.9 million.

data.title: Marina Protocol to Unlock Tokens on February 28
data.description: Marina Protocol is set to unlock approximately 26.58 million tokens on February 28 at 10:00 AM UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the protocol's planned schedule.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump to Visit China in Late March
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to visit China from March 31 to April 2. According to PANews, White House officials have confirmed the visit, which follows previous statements expressing anticipation for a welcoming ceremony.

data.title: Polymarket's Strategic Acquisition of Dome: Expanding Prediction Market Ecosystem
data.description: Crypto KOL 岳小鱼 (@yuexiaoyu) posted on X about Polymarket's recent acquisition of Dome, highlighting the company's ambition to expand its prediction market ecosystem. Dome serves as a unified prediction market API, enabling developers to access data from multiple platforms, including Polymarket and Kalshi. This strategic move aims to streamline access to market data, odds, trading volumes, and historical information, enhancing the functionality and reach of Polymarket's services.

Why this matters: Buterin's approach favors continuity over fragmentation while injecting stronger cypherpunk principles into the base layer. What to watch: will the proposed five-year timeline—possibly shortened by “AI coding and verification”—proves realistic? What do you think?
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/293877725612465?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: South Korea Maintains Trade Agreement Despite U.S. Tariff Ruling
data.description: South Korea announced that a recent U.S. Supreme Court decision, which nullified tariffs imposed under U.S. President Donald Trump's emergency powers, will not affect its comprehensive trade agreement with the United States. Bloomberg posted on X that the South Korean government emphasized the stability of its trade relations with Washington, despite the court's ruling. The decision by the Supreme Court addressed tariffs that were initially implemented as part of emergency measures. South Korea reassured that its trade framework with the U.S. remains intact and unaffected by this legal development.

data.title: This morning, Brother Machi placed multiple limit sell orders for ETH again, bringing the total number of sell orders to 14 in the $1980-$2025 range.
data.description: According to Hyperbot data, Huang Licheng, nicknamed "Brother Machi," placed multiple limit sell orders for Ethereum again in the early hours of today. Currently, he has placed a total of 14 limit sell orders for ETH in the range of $1,980 to $2,025. His 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum still holds 7,800 ETH, with a liquidation price of approximately $1,905, and is currently showing a floating loss of approximately $137,000.

data.title: Trump Opposes New Bridge Project Between Michigan and Canada
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently expressed opposition to a proposed bridge connecting Michigan with Canada. New York Times posted on X that this stance emerged less than a month after a billionaire, who owns a competing bridge, made significant contributions to Trump's campaign. The proposed bridge has been a topic of debate, with various stakeholders weighing in on its potential economic and logistical impacts. Trump's position has added a new dimension to the ongoing discussions, highlighting the intersection of infrastructure development and political influence.

data.title: JPMorgan Seeks to Transfer Trump's Lawsuit to New York Federal Court
data.description: JPMorgan has filed a legal request to transfer U.S. President Donald Trump's lawsuit concerning the closure of his accounts from Miami to a federal court in New York. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the bank's strategic move to shift the case's jurisdiction. The lawsuit, initiated by Trump, challenges the bank's decision to close his accounts, a matter that has drawn significant attention. The request for relocation underscores the complexities involved in the legal proceedings surrounding the case.

data.title: The "1011 insider whale" may have sold 60% of its BTC holdings, and seven newly created addresses have withdrawn over 460 million USDT from Binance.
data.description:
According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the "1011 insider whale" has sold approximately 60% of its Bitcoin holdings transferred to Binance. Since this whale deposited 11,318 BTC (worth $760.61 million) into Binance, seven newly created wallet addresses have withdrawn $464.48 million in USDT from Binance.

Currently, approximately $296 million worth of BTC remains on Binance.

data.title: Fabric Foundation: The ROBO airdrop registration and eligibility verification website is now live.
data.description: The Fabric Foundation announced on the X platform that the ROBO airdrop registration and eligibility verification portal is now live. Community members can now check their eligibility and complete the necessary steps before the application period begins. The portal will be open from February 20th to February 24th, and the airdrop allocation amount will be announced when the application window officially opens.

data.title: Bitcoin's Future Growth May Depend on AI Stock Valuation
data.description:
Bitcoin's potential for significant growth could be influenced by the valuation of artificial intelligence stocks, according to macroeconomist Lyn Alden. According to Cointelegraph, Alden discussed this possibility during a conversation with Natalie Brunell on the Coin Stories podcast, suggesting that if AI stocks become excessively overvalued, investors might shift their capital to other assets, including Bitcoin. Alden noted that when an asset's price reaches a level where further gains are difficult to justify, investors often seek opportunities with greater potential for upside. With Bitcoin currently down nearly 46% from its October all-time high of $126,100, Alden believes it could benefit from such a capital rotation.

The discussion also touched on the performance of AI stocks, particularly Nvidia, which is considered a key player in the AI sector. Jason Ware, chief investment officer at Albion Financial Group, expressed skepticism about whether the largest AI stocks can maintain their momentum into 2026. He highlighted Nvidia's significant role in the AI build-out but questioned if its growth could continue to support further stock price increases. Nvidia's stock has risen 35.48% over the past year, and Ware described it as possibly the most important company and stock in the U.S. market. The growing interest in AI has created a competitive environment for Bitcoin, as noted by Bitcoin developer Mark Carallo, who stated that Bitcoin is now "competing for capital" in a way it hasn't before.

Despite these challenges, Alden emphasized that Bitcoin doesn't require a substantial influx of capital to experience growth. She explained that a marginal increase in demand could drive Bitcoin higher, as long-term holders provide a stable foundation while short-term traders exit. Alden remarked that Bitcoin's price dynamics involve coins transitioning from speculative hands to those of committed holders, who are unlikely to sell unless prices rise significantly. At the time of publication, Bitcoin is trading at $67,849, down 24.49% over the past 30 days, according to CoinMarketCap. Alden does not anticipate a rapid surge in Bitcoin's price, noting that Bitcoin typically doesn't form V-shaped bottoms outside of events like COVID stimulus. Instead, she expects a gradual movement, potentially dropping $10,000 or $20,000 lower, as Bitcoin remains in a "grinding" phase.

data.title: Hong Kong's virtual asset industry is facing a "hidden compliance storm," and the Securities and Futures Professionals Association is calling for a suspension of mandatory examinations.
data.description: Hong Kong's virtual asset and related businesses are facing sudden changes in compliance requirements. According to Chan Chi-wah, president of the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Professionals Association, applicants for virtual asset license upgrades and existing responsible personnel (ROs) are required to take a virtual asset regulatory exam administered by a single organization. This exam is bundled with the organization's courses, course materials cannot be easily reviewed, and registration and technical support are confusing. It is understood that this requirement was not announced through official documents or public guidelines, but rather verbally or via individual emails, lacking transparency and fairness. This increases compliance costs for practitioners, impacts business development, and the absence of a public consultation mechanism means policy-making lacks frontline feedback. The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Professionals Association recommends maintaining the existing additional 5 hours of Continuing Professional Training (CPT) and urges regulators to immediately suspend the use of implicit policies to enforce the exam requirement, establish a transparent consultation mechanism, and incorporate stakeholder opinions into policy-making to ensure feasibility and market fairness. (Orangenews)

data.title: Bitdeer Expands Convertible Senior Notes Offering to $325 Million
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer has announced an increase in its convertible senior notes offering size to $325 million. According to NS3.AI, the company is also providing initial purchasers the option to acquire an additional $50 million of notes within 13 days of the initial issuance. This strategic move is intended to raise further capital to support Bitdeer's operational and growth initiatives.

data.title: Cathie Wood Highlights Bitcoin's Potential as 'Digital Gold'
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that Cathie Wood, in ARK Invest's 'Big Ideas 2026', reiterated her core belief about Bitcoin: it is not only a risk asset but also possesses long-term hedging and value storage attributes. She emphasized that Bitcoin's correlation with gold throughout historical cycles is minimal, indicating it does not merely replicate gold's price logic. On the supply side, Bitcoin's advantage is more pronounced, as its issuance is mathematically capped at 21 million, unlike gold, which can be increasingly produced in response to price stimuli. This 'unacceleratable' scarcity gives Bitcoin the potential to become a significant value storage tool in future generational wealth transfers. According to Cathie Wood, the narrative of Bitcoin as digital gold is just beginning.

data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, whale AHdUMw spent 10.26 million USDC two hours ago to buy 121,368 SOL at an average price of $84.57.

data.title: Bitdeer has increased the size of its convertible senior notes offering to $325 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer announced it will increase the size of its convertible senior notes offering to $325 million. Bitdeer also plans to grant initial purchasers an option to purchase up to an additional $50 million of the notes within 13 days of the initial offering date (inclusive). (Globenewswire)

data.title: The author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad" has bought Bitcoin at a price of $67,000, and the US dollar may be impacted by the debt crisis.
data.description: Robert Kiyosaki, author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad," posted on the X platform that despite the ongoing downturn in the crypto market, he chose to increase his holdings and bought Bitcoin at $67,000 for two reasons: 1. When the US debt problem impacts the dollar system, "massive money printing" will begin, with the Federal Reserve again printing trillions of dollars in fiat currency; 2. The total supply of Bitcoin, capped at 21 million, is nearing full mining, and when the "21 millionth Bitcoin" is mined, Bitcoin will have an advantage over gold.

data.title: MARA Completes Acquisition of Exaion Stake to Boost European Digital Infrastructure
data.description:
MARA announced on Friday that its French subsidiary, MARA France, has finalized the acquisition of a 64% stake in Exaion. According to ChainCatcher, the agreement was initially reached in August of last year. As part of the transaction, NJJ Capital has formed a strategic partnership with MARA, acquiring a 10% stake in MARA France. EDF Group remains a minority shareholder and client of Exaion.

Market reports indicate that MARA purchased the controlling stake in Exaion for $168 million in cash from its former parent company, EDF Pulse Ventures. The French government reviewed the transaction due to concerns over national sovereignty. The Exaion board will consist of representatives appointed by MARA, EDF Pulse Ventures, NJJ Capital, and Exaion's CEO and co-founder. Billionaire Xavier Niel and MARA CEO Fred Thiel will join the Exaion board.

The collaboration aims to accelerate Exaion's expansion and enhance its capabilities in secure cloud services and high-performance computing, positioning the France-based company as a leader in European digital infrastructure. EDF Group provides energy and services to approximately 41 million customers, with projected consolidated sales of €113.3 billion in 2025. MARA, listed on Nasdaq, saw its stock price decline by about 40% last year and is expected to release its quarterly earnings next week. In the previous quarter, the company achieved a record profit of $123 million by combining its Bitcoin operations with new power and AI assets.

data.title: US stocks closed mixed in the crypto sector, with Coinbase rising 3.26%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.47%, the S&P 500 rose 0.69%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.90%. The crypto sector was mixed, with Bit Digital down 2.38%, ETHZilla down 1.37%, Circle up 1.78%, Robinhood up 0.61%, and Coinbase up 3.26%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.
